1888790.name: Kardboard Kings - Soundtrack
1888790.description:
Kardboard Kings is a shop management simulation game where you open your own card shop on the seaside. Buy, trade, sell, and collect cards; gain a community reputation and hit shop goals; unlock new adornments, and hold exciting events to bring everyone to the best shop in town.

Kardboard King's End Phase features original tracks by the game's development duo Oscar Brittain and Rob Gross.
